title: bulbophyllum amplebracteatum subsp. orthoglossum
intro: Bulbophyllum amplebracteatum subsp. orthoglossum is a rare and lesser-known orchid species, belonging to the Bulbophyllum genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of Bulbophyllum amplebracteatum subsp. orthoglossum are often made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in water or alcohol, and can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
